violations.detail: @see link points to 'https://www.patternfly.org/components/slider#sliderstepobject' instead of the canonical 'https://www.patternfly.org/components/slider'
Non-standard section 'event handler' appears after 'internal'. Only standard sections (factory, instance, add, builder, aria, events, api, internal) are allowed
Extra blank line after constructor closing brace (line 48 is blank before the section separator at line 51)
Sub-component class Javadoc uses a plain comment ('/** ... */') but does not end with a period
